name: Midnight Executive
tagline: Midnight executive deck with brass accents, dashboard cards, risk heatmaps, and boardroom-style hierarchy.

palette.description: Midnight navy and charcoal surfaces with warm brass accents, soft blue highlights, and crisp ivory type.

typography.style: Compressed executive display type with neutral sans body.

best_for: Board updates, investor briefings, high-stakes leadership reviews, and any business narrative that needs to feel serious, premium, and tightly controlled.
avoid_for: Casual team workshops, playful launches, classroom decks, or content that needs to feel warm and approachable.

source_inspiration.name: Dark Bold Slides for Executive Presentations
source_inspiration.notes: Original HTML template rebuilt from public visual direction only; not a pixel copy and does not reuse source assets.
